steps.title: Calculate the target voltage
steps.content:
The initial voltage is 16 volts. We need to find when it drops to 15% of this value.
$$0.15 \times 16 = 2.4 \text{ volts}$$

steps.title: Read the time from the graph
steps.content: Locate 2.4 volts on the y-axis of the graph. Trace horizontally to where this level intersects the decay curve, then trace vertically down to read the corresponding time on the x-axis. The intersection occurs at approximately 1.71 seconds. That matches choice C — C is correct.
